commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: The diversity in the members of the body unites for the purpose of ensuring that the body fulfills its potential. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: If there were not great diversity among you, you could not be a body. If you were not a body, you could not be unified. If you were not one, you would not be equal in honor. It is because you are not all endowed with the same gift that you are a body.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
